changelog.title: mobile cards accordion
changelog.text: on mobile the github + scripts cards now do a big accordion thing as you scroll — one balloons open while the other collapses. also tidied up the bottom of the site.

changelog.title: smoother deep-links
changelog.text: opening a page link directly (like /github) now reveals it straight out of the loader instead of doing an awkward double transition. also gave the loading screen its own look on mobile.

changelog.title: scripts & tools page
changelog.text: new /scripts page showing off little tools i made (with the full source, copy + download) — starting with backly, my code backup CLI. the github + scripts links under projects are now expanding panels too.

changelog.title: new fluid playground
changelog.text: swapped the ink playground for pavel dobryakov's webgl fluid sim — now you just hover over it, no clicking needed. also reloading the page always brings you back to the top now.

changelog.title: og glow-up + a banner
changelog.text: redid the social preview image (nicer blob) and every page now gets its own. also threw a 'keep android open' countdown banner at the bottom of the site.

changelog.title: morphing loader
changelog.text: the two o's in 'zoop' on the loading screen now morph through random m3 shapes while it loads. the fluid playground also only loads once you scroll near it, and the shape picker wont land on the same one twice in a row.

changelog.title: github page
changelog.text: added a /github page that pulls my repos live from the github api and shows em off, profile and all. also /projects, /changelog and /github are proper routes now — they used to just redirect back to the homepage. and theres a full-width follow bar under the projects section so its easy to find.

changelog.title: transition fixes
changelog.text: the fluid wipe now waits for the loading screen to finish before it plays (it was running underneath the loader before). the github page slides in with that same woosh, the back button takes you home, and the profile is centered now.

changelog.title: WebMCP & llms.txt Support
changelog.text: Added browser-native WebMCP agent tool registrations (boop_blob, trigger_chaos, barrel_roll, splash_fluid, get_portfolio_info) and launched the /llms.txt discovery endpoint.

changelog.title: Skeleton Screens Loader
changelog.text: Implemented animated, glowing skeleton card elements during the initial boot and configuration warming phase.

changelog.title: Creative WebGL Refresh
changelog.text: Complete redesign featuring a Three.js Glass centerpiece with procedural dispersion, pointer-responsive liquid ink simulation, customizable theme accents, and a cookie-authenticated administration panel.
